title: ALO — Cluster Usage
description: Request rates, latency percentiles, error tracking, and data volume analytics.

panels.title: Total Request Rate
panels.description: Total request count over time across the selected filters.

targets.rawSql: SELECT $__timeInterval(timestamp) AS t, count() AS value FROM alo.alo_raw WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp) AND (('${cluster:csv}' = '*') OR cluster_name IN (${cluster:singlequote})) AND (('${application:csv}' = '*') OR identity_applicative_provider IN (${application:singlequote})) AND (('${target:csv}' = '*') OR request_target IN (${target:singlequote})) AND (('${operation:csv}' = '*') OR request_operation IN (${operation:singlequote})) AND (('${username:csv}' = '*') OR identity_username IN (${username:singlequote})) AND (('${cost_indicator:csv}' = '*') OR hasAny(stress_cost_indicator_names, [${cost_indicator:singlequote}])) AND (('${client_host:csv}' = '*') OR identity_client_host IN (${client_host:singlequote})) AND (('${template:csv}' = '*') OR request_template IN (${template:singlequote})) GROUP BY t ORDER BY t

panels.title: Rate by Operation
panels.description: Request rate over time, broken down by operation. Dashed series = hourly summary-index fallback (survives raw-data ILM expiry).

targets.rawSql: SELECT $__timeInterval(timestamp) AS t, request_operation AS series, count() AS value FROM alo.alo_raw WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp) AND (('${cluster:csv}' = '*') OR cluster_name IN (${cluster:singlequote})) AND (('${application:csv}' = '*') OR identity_applicative_provider IN (${application:singlequote})) AND (('${target:csv}' = '*') OR request_target IN (${target:singlequote})) AND (('${operation:csv}' = '*') OR request_operation IN (${operation:singlequote})) AND (('${username:csv}' = '*') OR identity_username IN (${username:singlequote})) AND (('${cost_indicator:csv}' = '*') OR hasAny(stress_cost_indicator_names, [${cost_indicator:singlequote}])) AND (('${client_host:csv}' = '*') OR identity_client_host IN (${client_host:singlequote})) AND (('${template:csv}' = '*') OR request_template IN (${template:singlequote}))   AND request_operation IN (    SELECT request_operation FROM alo.alo_raw     WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp) AND (('${cluster:csv}' = '*') OR cluster_name IN (${cluster:singlequote})) AND (('${application:csv}' = '*') OR identity_applicative_provider IN (${application:singlequote})) AND (('${target:csv}' = '*') OR request_target IN (${target:singlequote})) AND (('${operation:csv}' = '*') OR request_operation IN (${operation:singlequote})) AND (('${username:csv}' = '*') OR identity_username IN (${username:singlequote})) AND (('${cost_indicator:csv}' = '*') OR hasAny(stress_cost_indicator_names, [${cost_indicator:singlequote}])) AND (('${client_host:csv}' = '*') OR identity_client_host IN (${client_host:singlequote})) AND (('${template:csv}' = '*') OR request_template IN (${template:singlequote}))     GROUP BY request_operation ORDER BY count() DESC LIMIT 8  ) GROUP BY t, series ORDER BY t

SELECT toStartOfHour(time_bucket) AS t, request_operation AS series, countMerge(count_state) AS value FROM alo.alo_summary WHERE $__timeFilter(time_bucket) AND (('${cluster:csv}' = '*') OR cluster_name IN (${cluster:singlequote})) AND (('${application:csv}' = '*') OR identity_applicative_provider IN (${application:singlequote})) AND (('${target:csv}' = '*') OR request_target IN (${target:singlequote})) AND (('${operation:csv}' = '*') OR request_operation IN (${operation:singlequote})) AND (('${username:csv}' = '*') OR identity_username IN (${username:singlequote})) AND (('${cost_indicator:csv}' = '*') OR hasAny(stress_cost_indicator_names, [${cost_indicator:singlequote}])) AND (('${client_host:csv}' = '*') OR identity_client_host IN (${client_host:singlequote})) AND (('${template:csv}' = '*') OR request_template IN (${template:singlequote})) GROUP BY t, series ORDER BY t LIMIT 8 BY t

panels.title: Rate by Application
panels.description: Request rate over time, broken down by application. Dashed series = hourly summary-index fallback (survives raw-data ILM expiry).

targets.rawSql: SELECT $__timeInterval(timestamp) AS t, identity_applicative_provider AS series, count() AS value FROM alo.alo_raw WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp) AND (('${cluster:csv}' = '*') OR cluster_name IN (${cluster:singlequote})) AND (('${application:csv}' = '*') OR identity_applicative_provider IN (${application:singlequote})) AND (('${target:csv}' = '*') OR request_target IN (${target:singlequote})) AND (('${operation:csv}' = '*') OR request_operation IN (${operation:singlequote})) AND (('${username:csv}' = '*') OR identity_username IN (${username:singlequote})) AND (('${cost_indicator:csv}' = '*') OR hasAny(stress_cost_indicator_names, [${cost_indicator:singlequote}])) AND (('${client_host:csv}' = '*') OR identity_client_host IN (${client_host:singlequote})) AND (('${template:csv}' = '*') OR request_template IN (${template:singlequote}))   AND identity_applicative_provider IN (    SELECT identity_applicative_provider FROM alo.alo_raw     WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp) AND (('${cluster:csv}' = '*') OR cluster_name IN (${cluster:singlequote})) AND (('${application:csv}' = '*') OR identity_applicative_provider IN (${application:singlequote})) AND (('${target:csv}' = '*') OR request_target IN (${target:singlequote})) AND (('${operation:csv}' = '*') OR request_operation IN (${operation:singlequote})) AND (('${username:csv}' = '*') OR identity_username IN (${username:singlequote})) AND (('${cost_indicator:csv}' = '*') OR hasAny(stress_cost_indicator_names, [${cost_indicator:singlequote}])) AND (('${client_host:csv}' = '*') OR identity_client_host IN (${client_host:singlequote})) AND (('${template:csv}' = '*') OR request_template IN (${template:singlequote}))     GROUP BY identity_applicative_provider ORDER BY count() DESC LIMIT 8  ) GROUP BY t, series ORDER BY t

SELECT toStartOfHour(time_bucket) AS t, identity_applicative_provider AS series, countMerge(count_state) AS value FROM alo.alo_summary WHERE $__timeFilter(time_bucket) AND (('${cluster:csv}' = '*') OR cluster_name IN (${cluster:singlequote})) AND (('${application:csv}' = '*') OR identity_applicative_provider IN (${application:singlequote})) AND (('${target:csv}' = '*') OR request_target IN (${target:singlequote})) AND (('${operation:csv}' = '*') OR request_operation IN (${operation:singlequote})) AND (('${username:csv}' = '*') OR identity_username IN (${username:singlequote})) AND (('${cost_indicator:csv}' = '*') OR hasAny(stress_cost_indicator_names, [${cost_indicator:singlequote}])) AND (('${client_host:csv}' = '*') OR identity_client_host IN (${client_host:singlequote})) AND (('${template:csv}' = '*') OR request_template IN (${template:singlequote})) GROUP BY t, series ORDER BY t LIMIT 8 BY t

panels.title: Rate by Target Index
panels.description: Request rate over time, broken down by target index. Dashed series = hourly summary-index fallback (survives raw-data ILM expiry).

targets.rawSql: SELECT $__timeInterval(timestamp) AS t, request_target AS series, count() AS value FROM alo.alo_raw WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp) AND (('${cluster:csv}' = '*') OR cluster_name IN (${cluster:singlequote})) AND (('${application:csv}' = '*') OR identity_applicative_provider IN (${application:singlequote})) AND (('${target:csv}' = '*') OR request_target IN (${target:singlequote})) AND (('${operation:csv}' = '*') OR request_operation IN (${operation:singlequote})) AND (('${username:csv}' = '*') OR identity_username IN (${username:singlequote})) AND (('${cost_indicator:csv}' = '*') OR hasAny(stress_cost_indicator_names, [${cost_indicator:singlequote}])) AND (('${client_host:csv}' = '*') OR identity_client_host IN (${client_host:singlequote})) AND (('${template:csv}' = '*') OR request_template IN (${template:singlequote}))   AND request_target IN (    SELECT request_target FROM alo.alo_raw     WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp) AND (('${cluster:csv}' = '*') OR cluster_name IN (${cluster:singlequote})) AND (('${application:csv}' = '*') OR identity_applicative_provider IN (${application:singlequote})) AND (('${target:csv}' = '*') OR request_target IN (${target:singlequote})) AND (('${operation:csv}' = '*') OR request_operation IN (${operation:singlequote})) AND (('${username:csv}' = '*') OR identity_username IN (${username:singlequote})) AND (('${cost_indicator:csv}' = '*') OR hasAny(stress_cost_indicator_names, [${cost_indicator:singlequote}])) AND (('${client_host:csv}' = '*') OR identity_client_host IN (${client_host:singlequote})) AND (('${template:csv}' = '*') OR request_template IN (${template:singlequote}))     GROUP BY request_target ORDER BY count() DESC LIMIT 8  ) GROUP BY t, series ORDER BY t

SELECT toStartOfHour(time_bucket) AS t, request_target AS series, countMerge(count_state) AS value FROM alo.alo_summary WHERE $__timeFilter(time_bucket) AND (('${cluster:csv}' = '*') OR cluster_name IN (${cluster:singlequote})) AND (('${application:csv}' = '*') OR identity_applicative_provider IN (${application:singlequote})) AND (('${target:csv}' = '*') OR request_target IN (${target:singlequote})) AND (('${operation:csv}' = '*') OR request_operation IN (${operation:singlequote})) AND (('${username:csv}' = '*') OR identity_username IN (${username:singlequote})) AND (('${cost_indicator:csv}' = '*') OR hasAny(stress_cost_indicator_names, [${cost_indicator:singlequote}])) AND (('${client_host:csv}' = '*') OR identity_client_host IN (${client_host:singlequote})) AND (('${template:csv}' = '*') OR request_template IN (${template:singlequote})) GROUP BY t, series ORDER BY t LIMIT 8 BY t

panels.title: Rate by Template
panels.description: Request rate over time, broken down by template. Dashed series = hourly summary-index fallback (survives raw-data ILM expiry).

targets.rawSql: SELECT $__timeInterval(timestamp) AS t, request_template AS series, count() AS value FROM alo.alo_raw WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp) AND (('${cluster:csv}' = '*') OR cluster_name IN (${cluster:singlequote})) AND (('${application:csv}' = '*') OR identity_applicative_provider IN (${application:singlequote})) AND (('${target:csv}' = '*') OR request_target IN (${target:singlequote})) AND (('${operation:csv}' = '*') OR request_operation IN (${operation:singlequote})) AND (('${username:csv}' = '*') OR identity_username IN (${username:singlequote})) AND (('${cost_indicator:csv}' = '*') OR hasAny(stress_cost_indicator_names, [${cost_indicator:singlequote}])) AND (('${client_host:csv}' = '*') OR identity_client_host IN (${client_host:singlequote})) AND (('${template:csv}' = '*') OR request_template IN (${template:singlequote}))   AND request_template IN (    SELECT request_template FROM alo.alo_raw     WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp) AND (('${cluster:csv}' = '*') OR cluster_name IN (${cluster:singlequote})) AND (('${application:csv}' = '*') OR identity_applicative_provider IN (${application:singlequote})) AND (('${target:csv}' = '*') OR request_target IN (${target:singlequote})) AND (('${operation:csv}' = '*') OR request_operation IN (${operation:singlequote})) AND (('${username:csv}' = '*') OR identity_username IN (${username:singlequote})) AND (('${cost_indicator:csv}' = '*') OR hasAny(stress_cost_indicator_names, [${cost_indicator:singlequote}])) AND (('${client_host:csv}' = '*') OR identity_client_host IN (${client_host:singlequote})) AND (('${template:csv}' = '*') OR request_template IN (${template:singlequote}))     GROUP BY request_template ORDER BY count() DESC LIMIT 8  ) GROUP BY t, series ORDER BY t

SELECT toStartOfHour(time_bucket) AS t, request_template AS series, countMerge(count_state) AS value FROM alo.alo_summary WHERE $__timeFilter(time_bucket) AND (('${cluster:csv}' = '*') OR cluster_name IN (${cluster:singlequote})) AND (('${application:csv}' = '*') OR identity_applicative_provider IN (${application:singlequote})) AND (('${target:csv}' = '*') OR request_target IN (${target:singlequote})) AND (('${operation:csv}' = '*') OR request_operation IN (${operation:singlequote})) AND (('${username:csv}' = '*') OR identity_username IN (${username:singlequote})) AND (('${cost_indicator:csv}' = '*') OR hasAny(stress_cost_indicator_names, [${cost_indicator:singlequote}])) AND (('${client_host:csv}' = '*') OR identity_client_host IN (${client_host:singlequote})) AND (('${template:csv}' = '*') OR request_template IN (${template:singlequote})) GROUP BY t, series ORDER BY t LIMIT 8 BY t

panels.title: ES Latency
panels.description: Elasticsearch response-time trend with Avg / P50 / P95 / P99. Rising P95/P99 signals tail-latency issues.

targets.rawSql: SELECT $__timeInterval(timestamp) AS t, avg(response_es_took_ms) AS value FROM alo.alo_raw WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp) AND (('${cluster:csv}' = '*') OR cluster_name IN (${cluster:singlequote})) AND (('${application:csv}' = '*') OR identity_applicative_provider IN (${application:singlequote})) AND (('${target:csv}' = '*') OR request_target IN (${target:singlequote})) AND (('${operation:csv}' = '*') OR request_operation IN (${operation:singlequote})) AND (('${username:csv}' = '*') OR identity_username IN (${username:singlequote})) AND (('${cost_indicator:csv}' = '*') OR hasAny(stress_cost_indicator_names, [${cost_indicator:singlequote}])) AND (('${client_host:csv}' = '*') OR identity_client_host IN (${client_host:singlequote})) AND (('${template:csv}' = '*') OR request_template IN (${template:singlequote})) GROUP BY t ORDER BY t

SELECT $__timeInterval(timestamp) AS t, quantile(0.5)(response_es_took_ms) AS value FROM alo.alo_raw WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp) AND (('${cluster:csv}' = '*') OR cluster_name IN (${cluster:singlequote})) AND (('${application:csv}' = '*') OR identity_applicative_provider IN (${application:singlequote})) AND (('${target:csv}' = '*') OR request_target IN (${target:singlequote})) AND (('${operation:csv}' = '*') OR request_operation IN (${operation:singlequote})) AND (('${username:csv}' = '*') OR identity_username IN (${username:singlequote})) AND (('${cost_indicator:csv}' = '*') OR hasAny(stress_cost_indicator_names, [${cost_indicator:singlequote}])) AND (('${client_host:csv}' = '*') OR identity_client_host IN (${client_host:singlequote})) AND (('${template:csv}' = '*') OR request_template IN (${template:singlequote})) GROUP BY t ORDER BY t

SELECT $__timeInterval(timestamp) AS t, quantile(0.95)(response_es_took_ms) AS value FROM alo.alo_raw WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp) AND (('${cluster:csv}' = '*') OR cluster_name IN (${cluster:singlequote})) AND (('${application:csv}' = '*') OR identity_applicative_provider IN (${application:singlequote})) AND (('${target:csv}' = '*') OR request_target IN (${target:singlequote})) AND (('${operation:csv}' = '*') OR request_operation IN (${operation:singlequote})) AND (('${username:csv}' = '*') OR identity_username IN (${username:singlequote})) AND (('${cost_indicator:csv}' = '*') OR hasAny(stress_cost_indicator_names, [${cost_indicator:singlequote}])) AND (('${client_host:csv}' = '*') OR identity_client_host IN (${client_host:singlequote})) AND (('${template:csv}' = '*') OR request_template IN (${template:singlequote})) GROUP BY t ORDER BY t

SELECT $__timeInterval(timestamp) AS t, quantile(0.99)(response_es_took_ms) AS value FROM alo.alo_raw WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp) AND (('${cluster:csv}' = '*') OR cluster_name IN (${cluster:singlequote})) AND (('${application:csv}' = '*') OR identity_applicative_provider IN (${application:singlequote})) AND (('${target:csv}' = '*') OR request_target IN (${target:singlequote})) AND (('${operation:csv}' = '*') OR request_operation IN (${operation:singlequote})) AND (('${username:csv}' = '*') OR identity_username IN (${username:singlequote})) AND (('${cost_indicator:csv}' = '*') OR hasAny(stress_cost_indicator_names, [${cost_indicator:singlequote}])) AND (('${client_host:csv}' = '*') OR identity_client_host IN (${client_host:singlequote})) AND (('${template:csv}' = '*') OR request_template IN (${template:singlequote})) GROUP BY t ORDER BY t

panels.title: Error Rate
panels.description: Count of error responses (status ≥ 400) vs total requests.

targets.rawSql: SELECT $__timeInterval(timestamp) AS t, count() AS value FROM alo.alo_raw WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp) AND (('${cluster:csv}' = '*') OR cluster_name IN (${cluster:singlequote})) AND (('${application:csv}' = '*') OR identity_applicative_provider IN (${application:singlequote})) AND (('${target:csv}' = '*') OR request_target IN (${target:singlequote})) AND (('${operation:csv}' = '*') OR request_operation IN (${operation:singlequote})) AND (('${username:csv}' = '*') OR identity_username IN (${username:singlequote})) AND (('${cost_indicator:csv}' = '*') OR hasAny(stress_cost_indicator_names, [${cost_indicator:singlequote}])) AND (('${client_host:csv}' = '*') OR identity_client_host IN (${client_host:singlequote})) AND (('${template:csv}' = '*') OR request_template IN (${template:singlequote})) AND response_status >= 400 GROUP BY t ORDER BY t

SELECT $__timeInterval(timestamp) AS t, count() AS value FROM alo.alo_raw WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp) AND (('${cluster:csv}' = '*') OR cluster_name IN (${cluster:singlequote})) AND (('${application:csv}' = '*') OR identity_applicative_provider IN (${application:singlequote})) AND (('${target:csv}' = '*') OR request_target IN (${target:singlequote})) AND (('${operation:csv}' = '*') OR request_operation IN (${operation:singlequote})) AND (('${username:csv}' = '*') OR identity_username IN (${username:singlequote})) AND (('${cost_indicator:csv}' = '*') OR hasAny(stress_cost_indicator_names, [${cost_indicator:singlequote}])) AND (('${client_host:csv}' = '*') OR identity_client_host IN (${client_host:singlequote})) AND (('${template:csv}' = '*') OR request_template IN (${template:singlequote})) GROUP BY t ORDER BY t

panels.title: Requests by Status Code
panels.description: Top 10 response status codes by request count.

targets.rawSql: SELECT response_status AS "Status Code", count() AS "Requests" FROM alo.alo_raw WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp) AND (('${cluster:csv}' = '*') OR cluster_name IN (${cluster:singlequote})) AND (('${application:csv}' = '*') OR identity_applicative_provider IN (${application:singlequote})) AND (('${target:csv}' = '*') OR request_target IN (${target:singlequote})) AND (('${operation:csv}' = '*') OR request_operation IN (${operation:singlequote})) AND (('${username:csv}' = '*') OR identity_username IN (${username:singlequote})) AND (('${cost_indicator:csv}' = '*') OR hasAny(stress_cost_indicator_names, [${cost_indicator:singlequote}])) AND (('${client_host:csv}' = '*') OR identity_client_host IN (${client_host:singlequote})) AND (('${template:csv}' = '*') OR request_template IN (${template:singlequote})) GROUP BY "Status Code" ORDER BY "Requests" DESC LIMIT 10

panels.title: Requests by Application
panels.description: Per-application request counts and ES latency percentiles.

targets.rawSql: SELECT identity_applicative_provider AS "Application", count() AS "Requests", quantile(0.5)(response_es_took_ms) AS "P50 ES Latency (ms)", quantile(0.95)(response_es_took_ms) AS "P95 ES Latency (ms)", quantile(0.99)(response_es_took_ms) AS "P99 ES Latency (ms)" FROM alo.alo_raw WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp) AND (('${cluster:csv}' = '*') OR cluster_name IN (${cluster:singlequote})) AND (('${application:csv}' = '*') OR identity_applicative_provider IN (${application:singlequote})) AND (('${target:csv}' = '*') OR request_target IN (${target:singlequote})) AND (('${operation:csv}' = '*') OR request_operation IN (${operation:singlequote})) AND (('${username:csv}' = '*') OR identity_username IN (${username:singlequote})) AND (('${cost_indicator:csv}' = '*') OR hasAny(stress_cost_indicator_names, [${cost_indicator:singlequote}])) AND (('${client_host:csv}' = '*') OR identity_client_host IN (${client_host:singlequote})) AND (('${template:csv}' = '*') OR request_template IN (${template:singlequote})) GROUP BY "Application" ORDER BY "Requests" DESC LIMIT 10

panels.title: Read Volume (Total Hits)
panels.description: Total documents matched by queries, split by operation type.

targets.rawSql: SELECT $__timeInterval(timestamp) AS t, request_operation AS series, sum(response_hits) AS value FROM alo.alo_raw WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp) AND (('${cluster:csv}' = '*') OR cluster_name IN (${cluster:singlequote})) AND (('${application:csv}' = '*') OR identity_applicative_provider IN (${application:singlequote})) AND (('${target:csv}' = '*') OR request_target IN (${target:singlequote})) AND (('${operation:csv}' = '*') OR request_operation IN (${operation:singlequote})) AND (('${username:csv}' = '*') OR identity_username IN (${username:singlequote})) AND (('${cost_indicator:csv}' = '*') OR hasAny(stress_cost_indicator_names, [${cost_indicator:singlequote}])) AND (('${client_host:csv}' = '*') OR identity_client_host IN (${client_host:singlequote})) AND (('${template:csv}' = '*') OR request_template IN (${template:singlequote}))   AND request_operation IN (    SELECT request_operation FROM alo.alo_raw     WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp) AND (('${cluster:csv}' = '*') OR cluster_name IN (${cluster:singlequote})) AND (('${application:csv}' = '*') OR identity_applicative_provider IN (${application:singlequote})) AND (('${target:csv}' = '*') OR request_target IN (${target:singlequote})) AND (('${operation:csv}' = '*') OR request_operation IN (${operation:singlequote})) AND (('${username:csv}' = '*') OR identity_username IN (${username:singlequote})) AND (('${cost_indicator:csv}' = '*') OR hasAny(stress_cost_indicator_names, [${cost_indicator:singlequote}])) AND (('${client_host:csv}' = '*') OR identity_client_host IN (${client_host:singlequote})) AND (('${template:csv}' = '*') OR request_template IN (${template:singlequote}))     GROUP BY request_operation ORDER BY count() DESC LIMIT 8  ) GROUP BY t, series ORDER BY t

panels.title: Write Volume (Docs Affected)
panels.description: Total documents written (indexed / updated / deleted), split by operation type.

targets.rawSql: SELECT $__timeInterval(timestamp) AS t, request_operation AS series, sum(response_docs_affected) AS value FROM alo.alo_raw WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp) AND (('${cluster:csv}' = '*') OR cluster_name IN (${cluster:singlequote})) AND (('${application:csv}' = '*') OR identity_applicative_provider IN (${application:singlequote})) AND (('${target:csv}' = '*') OR request_target IN (${target:singlequote})) AND (('${operation:csv}' = '*') OR request_operation IN (${operation:singlequote})) AND (('${username:csv}' = '*') OR identity_username IN (${username:singlequote})) AND (('${cost_indicator:csv}' = '*') OR hasAny(stress_cost_indicator_names, [${cost_indicator:singlequote}])) AND (('${client_host:csv}' = '*') OR identity_client_host IN (${client_host:singlequote})) AND (('${template:csv}' = '*') OR request_template IN (${template:singlequote}))   AND request_operation IN (    SELECT request_operation FROM alo.alo_raw     WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp) AND (('${cluster:csv}' = '*') OR cluster_name IN (${cluster:singlequote})) AND (('${application:csv}' = '*') OR identity_applicative_provider IN (${application:singlequote})) AND (('${target:csv}' = '*') OR request_target IN (${target:singlequote})) AND (('${operation:csv}' = '*') OR request_operation IN (${operation:singlequote})) AND (('${username:csv}' = '*') OR identity_username IN (${username:singlequote})) AND (('${cost_indicator:csv}' = '*') OR hasAny(stress_cost_indicator_names, [${cost_indicator:singlequote}])) AND (('${client_host:csv}' = '*') OR identity_client_host IN (${client_host:singlequote})) AND (('${template:csv}' = '*') OR request_template IN (${template:singlequote}))     GROUP BY request_operation ORDER BY count() DESC LIMIT 8  ) GROUP BY t, series ORDER BY t

panels.title: Payload Sizes
panels.description: Average request and response payload sizes over time.

targets.rawSql: SELECT $__timeInterval(timestamp) AS t, avg(request_size_bytes) AS value FROM alo.alo_raw WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp) AND (('${cluster:csv}' = '*') OR cluster_name IN (${cluster:singlequote})) AND (('${application:csv}' = '*') OR identity_applicative_provider IN (${application:singlequote})) AND (('${target:csv}' = '*') OR request_target IN (${target:singlequote})) AND (('${operation:csv}' = '*') OR request_operation IN (${operation:singlequote})) AND (('${username:csv}' = '*') OR identity_username IN (${username:singlequote})) AND (('${cost_indicator:csv}' = '*') OR hasAny(stress_cost_indicator_names, [${cost_indicator:singlequote}])) AND (('${client_host:csv}' = '*') OR identity_client_host IN (${client_host:singlequote})) AND (('${template:csv}' = '*') OR request_template IN (${template:singlequote})) GROUP BY t ORDER BY t

SELECT $__timeInterval(timestamp) AS t, avg(response_size_bytes) AS value FROM alo.alo_raw WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp) AND (('${cluster:csv}' = '*') OR cluster_name IN (${cluster:singlequote})) AND (('${application:csv}' = '*') OR identity_applicative_provider IN (${application:singlequote})) AND (('${target:csv}' = '*') OR request_target IN (${target:singlequote})) AND (('${operation:csv}' = '*') OR request_operation IN (${operation:singlequote})) AND (('${username:csv}' = '*') OR identity_username IN (${username:singlequote})) AND (('${cost_indicator:csv}' = '*') OR hasAny(stress_cost_indicator_names, [${cost_indicator:singlequote}])) AND (('${client_host:csv}' = '*') OR identity_client_host IN (${client_host:singlequote})) AND (('${template:csv}' = '*') OR request_template IN (${template:singlequote})) GROUP BY t ORDER BY t

panels.title: Top 10 Applications
panels.description: Top 10 applicative providers by request count.

targets.rawSql: SELECT identity_applicative_provider AS bucket, count() AS value FROM alo.alo_raw WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp) AND (('${cluster:csv}' = '*') OR cluster_name IN (${cluster:singlequote})) AND (('${application:csv}' = '*') OR identity_applicative_provider IN (${application:singlequote})) AND (('${target:csv}' = '*') OR request_target IN (${target:singlequote})) AND (('${operation:csv}' = '*') OR request_operation IN (${operation:singlequote})) AND (('${username:csv}' = '*') OR identity_username IN (${username:singlequote})) AND (('${cost_indicator:csv}' = '*') OR hasAny(stress_cost_indicator_names, [${cost_indicator:singlequote}])) AND (('${client_host:csv}' = '*') OR identity_client_host IN (${client_host:singlequote})) AND (('${template:csv}' = '*') OR request_template IN (${template:singlequote})) GROUP BY bucket ORDER BY value DESC LIMIT 10

panels.title: Top 10 Indices
panels.description: Top 10 target indices by request count.

targets.rawSql: SELECT request_target AS bucket, count() AS value FROM alo.alo_raw WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp) AND (('${cluster:csv}' = '*') OR cluster_name IN (${cluster:singlequote})) AND (('${application:csv}' = '*') OR identity_applicative_provider IN (${application:singlequote})) AND (('${target:csv}' = '*') OR request_target IN (${target:singlequote})) AND (('${operation:csv}' = '*') OR request_operation IN (${operation:singlequote})) AND (('${username:csv}' = '*') OR identity_username IN (${username:singlequote})) AND (('${cost_indicator:csv}' = '*') OR hasAny(stress_cost_indicator_names, [${cost_indicator:singlequote}])) AND (('${client_host:csv}' = '*') OR identity_client_host IN (${client_host:singlequote})) AND (('${template:csv}' = '*') OR request_template IN (${template:singlequote})) GROUP BY bucket ORDER BY value DESC LIMIT 10

SELECT identity_username AS bucket, count() AS value FROM alo.alo_raw WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp) AND (('${cluster:csv}' = '*') OR cluster_name IN (${cluster:singlequote})) AND (('${application:csv}' = '*') OR identity_applicative_provider IN (${application:singlequote})) AND (('${target:csv}' = '*') OR request_target IN (${target:singlequote})) AND (('${operation:csv}' = '*') OR request_operation IN (${operation:singlequote})) AND (('${username:csv}' = '*') OR identity_username IN (${username:singlequote})) AND (('${cost_indicator:csv}' = '*') OR hasAny(stress_cost_indicator_names, [${cost_indicator:singlequote}])) AND (('${client_host:csv}' = '*') OR identity_client_host IN (${client_host:singlequote})) AND (('${template:csv}' = '*') OR request_template IN (${template:singlequote})) GROUP BY bucket ORDER BY value DESC LIMIT 10

query.rawSql: SELECT DISTINCT cluster_name FROM alo.alo_raw WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp) ORDER BY 1 LIMIT 1000
SELECT DISTINCT identity_applicative_provider FROM alo.alo_raw WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp) ORDER BY 1 LIMIT 1000
SELECT DISTINCT request_target FROM alo.alo_raw WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp) ORDER BY 1 LIMIT 1000
SELECT DISTINCT request_operation FROM alo.alo_raw WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp) ORDER BY 1 LIMIT 1000
SELECT DISTINCT identity_username FROM alo.alo_raw WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp) ORDER BY 1 LIMIT 1000
SELECT DISTINCT arrayJoin(stress_cost_indicator_names) FROM alo.alo_raw WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp) ORDER BY 1 LIMIT 1000
SELECT DISTINCT identity_client_host FROM alo.alo_raw WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp) ORDER BY 1 LIMIT 1000
SELECT DISTINCT request_template FROM alo.alo_raw WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp) ORDER BY 1 LIMIT 1000
